title: Add AI Chatbot 'Chat with Nobita' & More Funny Games

requirements.text: Rename the 'Chat with me' section label to 'Chat with Nobita' everywhere it appears in the app — navigation links, page headings, dashboard portal card, and any route titles.

quotes: change it to Chat with Nobita

acceptanceCriteria: The navigation item previously labeled 'Chat with me' now reads 'Chat with Nobita'.
The ChatPage heading displays 'Chat with Nobita'.
The dashboard portal card for the chat section shows 'Chat with Nobita'.

requirements.text: Replace the current static/canned bot response logic in ChatPage.tsx and botResponses.ts with an intelligent rule-based conversational AI engine that can understand and respond meaningfully to a wide variety of user questions and topics. The bot persona must be 'Nobita' — friendly, funny, childlike, and Doraemon-universe flavored. Implement topic detection (greetings, questions, emotions, school/homework, gadgets, friendship, love, food, weather, general knowledge, jokes, etc.) with contextual, varied, and funny replies for each topic. The bot should never give a generic 'I don't know' — it should always attempt a clever, in-character Nobita-style answer.

quotes: whatever I message means it's want to reply with the answer what's they asking to it

acceptanceCriteria: Sending a greeting like 'hello' returns a warm Nobita-style greeting.
Asking a factual question (e.g., 'what is the capital of Japan?') returns a relevant, in-character answer.
Asking about Doraemon gadgets returns a funny, themed response.
Asking a joke or funny question returns a humorous reply.
The bot never returns an empty or undefined response.
Responses feel varied — sending the same message twice can return different replies.

requirements.text: Add at least 3 new funny/entertaining mini-games to the GamesPage and corresponding routes. Suggested games: (1) Doraemon Gadget Clicker — click as many gadgets as possible before time runs out; (2) Nobita's Exam Quiz — funny multiple-choice quiz with Doraemon trivia questions and silly wrong answers; (3) Whack-a-Doraemon — a whack-a-mole style game where Doraemon characters pop up and the player clicks them for points. Each game should have a playful Doraemon-themed UI, a score display, and a restart button.
acceptanceCriteria: GamesPage shows at least 3 new game cards in addition to the existing 3 games.
Each new game has its own route and page component.
Each new game displays a score and a restart/play again button.
Games have a Doraemon-themed visual style consistent with the rest of the app.
All new game routes are registered in App.tsx.

constraints: Do not use any external AI/LLM API — the chatbot must be implemented entirely client-side with rule-based NLP/keyword matching logic.
Preserve the existing passphrase lock ('Nobita') and authentication flow.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Maintain the existing Doraemon-themed design system (colors, fonts, glassmorphism, neon glows).
nonGoals: Real OpenAI / Anthropic / external AI API integration.
Backend changes to support chatbot — all logic stays client-side.
Modifying or removing the three existing games (Sliding Puzzle, Maze, Memory Match).
Changing the passphrase or authentication mechanism.

required: Cute chibi Nobita character avatar with school uniform and glasses, transparent background (nobita-avatar.dim_200x200.png)
Whack-a-mole style game hole with grass border for game background tile (game-hole.dim_128x128.png)
Doraemon gadget icon set collage showing 4 gadgets on a starry background (gadget-clicker-bg.dim_400x200.png)
